calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From The Provisions Of Government Code Section 954.4; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER BRADFORD SOLINSKY's Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From The Provisions Of Government Code Section 954.4.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed petition for order relieving petitioner from the requirements of Government Code section 945.4 is granted.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
